+            Steps = "1. Bring dashi stock to a gentle simmer.\n2. Add cubed tofu and wakame.\n3. Remove from heat and dissolve miso paste into broth.\n4. Ladle into bowls and garnish with sliced green onions.",
+            Ratings = [4, 4, 3]
+        },
+    ];
+
+    private int _nextId = 9;
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<string> GetCategories() =>
+        _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().Order().ToList();
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Recipe> GetByCategory(string category) =>
+        _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
+
+    public Recipe? GetById(int id) =>
+        _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
+
+    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
+    {
+        var recipe = GetById(recipeId);
+        if (recipe is not null && stars is >= 1 and <= 5)
+        {
+            recipe.Ratings.Add(stars);
+        }
+    }
+
+    public void AddRecipe(string title, string category, string ingredients, string steps)
+    {
+        _recipes.Add(new Recipe
+        {
+            Id = _nextId++,
+            Title = title,
+            Category = category,
+            Ingredients = ingredients,
+            Steps = steps
+        });
+    }
+}
+

data.content:
Build succeeded with zero warnings and zero errors. Here's a summary of what was created:

**Project: `RecipeShare`** — A Blazor Web App using per-component interactivity.

### Structure
| Layer | Files |
|---|---|
| **Model** | `Models/Recipe.cs` — Recipe with title, category, ingredients, steps, ratings |
| **Service** | `Services/RecipeService.cs` — Singleton in-memory store with 8 seed recipes |
| **Pages (static SSR)** | `Home.razor` — Category grid with counts; `Category.razor` — Lists recipes in a category; `RecipeDetail.razor` — Full recipe view |
| **Pages (interactive)** | `SubmitRecipe.razor` — Form with title, category, ingredients, steps (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`) |
| **Components** | `Shared/StarRating.razor` — Click-to-rate 1–5 stars, rendered interactive only on the recipe detail page |

### Render mode strategy
- **Most pages** render as static SSR (read-only content, fast initial load).
- **StarRating** uses `@rendermode="InteractiveServer"` on the component tag in `RecipeDetail.razor`.
- **SubmitRecipe** uses `@rendermode InteractiveServer` at the page level for form binding.

Run with `dotnet run --project RecipeShare`.
